main_story_missions.title: Welcome Back to Newport
main_story_missions.description: Return to Newport, reacquaint yourself with Barbers Row, and reconnect with Mentor.

objectives.description: Drive into Newport from the highway
Walk Barbers Row
Meet with Mentor at Ace's Barbershop
Claim the safehouse in Jacksonport

main_story_missions.cutscene: ACE_RETURNS — Ace's car rolls into Newport. Barbers Row at dusk. Mentor steps out of the shop.
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: White River visible at the end of Main Street. Old-timers on dominoes bench.

main_story_missions.title: The Cut
main_story_missions.description: Prove yourself in the barbershop, earn community respect, and get Mentor's blessing.

objectives.description: Introduce yourself to Mentor's shop clients
Complete 3 haircut minigames
Earn $50 in tips
Raise Barbers Row respect to 25

main_story_missions.cutscene: THE_CUT — Mentor watches Ace finish his last client. Slow nod. 'You still got it, boy.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Mrs. Henderson pokes her head in from across the street. Local gossip triggers.

main_story_missions.title: Welcome to the DeVille District
main_story_missions.description: Marcus DeVille recruits Ace. Head to the warehouse with Trix, secure the belt shipment.

objectives.description: Meet Marcus DeVille at the Flagship
Drive to the warehouse with Trix
Clear rivals from the warehouse
Load the belt crates into the van
Get out before the police arrive — 2-star wanted level
Deliver the crates to Marcus's block

main_story_missions.cutscene: MARCUS_PITCH — Marcus in gold-trim Caddy. 'The DeVille brand needs a man with your particular skill set.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Print shop running in the background. DeVille Coin kiosk outside.

main_story_missions.title: First Flip
main_story_missions.description: Run Marcus's first street-level distribution job across three Newport districts.

objectives.description: Pick up merch from the print shop
Deliver to Barbers Row contact
Deliver to Jacksonport contact
Deliver to Riverfront contact
Return with the collection to Marcus

main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Trix gives directions via phone. Rico's tow trucks visible near Diaz.

main_story_missions.title: Block Party
main_story_missions.description: Marcus throws a DeVille Block Party to announce Ace's arrival. Ends Act 1.

objectives.description: Help set up the block — collect equipment from 3 spots
Handle 2 crowd incidents during the party
Stand by Marcus for his speech
Deal with Rico's crew crashing the party

main_story_missions.cutscene: BLOCK_PARTY_END — Rico's tow truck siren in the distance. Marcus: 'Newport just got a little more gold.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Community Center visible. Mrs. Henderson watches from her porch disapprovingly.

main_story_missions.title: Crypto Collapse
main_story_missions.description: Someone is mining DeVille Coin. Track down the server farm and shut it down.

objectives.description: Visit Marcus's crypto guy to trace the IP
Locate the basement server farm in Jacksonport
Remove the 4 guards protecting the servers
Smash or short-circuit all 6 server rigs
Escape — 1-star wanted level from noise complaint

main_story_missions.cutscene: COIN_CRASH — Marcus stares at his phone. 'DeVille Coin is... negative?' Ace: 'Marcus...'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Jacksonport High School visible nearby. Pawn shop owner watches from doorway.

main_story_missions.title: Viral Warfare
main_story_missions.description: A bot farm is killing Lexi Vance's engagement. She wants it handled — and she wants footage.

objectives.description: Meet Lexi at her compound
Follow the drone to the bot operator's apartment
Confront the bot operator before he deletes everything
Grab the router and laptop
Return everything to Lexi's compound

main_story_missions.cutscene: LEXI_INTRO — Drone flies into frame. Lexi steps off an elevator. 'You're late. The Algorithm doesn't wait.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Drone footage of Barbers Row plays on her monitor. She already knows who Ace is.

main_story_missions.title: Tow-Truck Takedown
main_story_missions.description: Rico's fleet is being sabotaged. He wants Ace to find out who — and end it.

objectives.description: Meet Big Rico at the compound
Inspect the 3 sabotaged trucks
Tail the suspect vehicle without being spotted
Box in the saboteur and force a stop
Bring the saboteur back to Rico — driving or dragged

main_story_missions.cutscene: RICO_INTRO — Rico eating a quesadilla next to Deborah. 'Someone's cutting my cables. I named her, kid. NOBODY cuts Deborah's cables.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Compound dogs visible. Elena rolling her eyes in the background.

main_story_missions.title: Wellness Gone Wrong
main_story_missions.description: Chad is going public about Fable's supplements. Discredit him before he tanks the Center.

objectives.description: Visit the Enlightenment Center and meet Dr. Fable
Track down Chad at Miss Pearl's Diner
Bribe OR outargue Chad in front of diner witnesses
Retrieve Chad's supplement evidence bag
Report back to Fable

main_story_missions.cutscene: FABLE_INTRO — Incense smoke. Fable in silk robe. 'The universe sent you. Also, Chad is a problem.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Miss Pearl glaring at everyone. Chad's protest sign visible outside.

main_story_missions.title: The Leak
main_story_missions.description: Someone leaked Marcus's contracts. Trace the leak up the chain — and find the Mayor's fingerprints.

objectives.description: Investigate the Gazette for the source of the leak
Break into the Gazette archive room — stealth optional
Find the leaked contract with City Hall letterhead
Follow the Gazette contact to City Hall
Photograph the handoff between contact and the Mayor's aide

main_story_missions.cutscene: THE_REVEAL — Ace shows Marcus the photo. Marcus stares. Long beat. 'The Mayor? He's been playing all of us.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: City Hall clock tower visible. Patricia Dawn seen entering the Gazette.

main_story_missions.title: Bot Swarm
main_story_missions.description: An AI clone of Lexi is outperforming her. Find the startup running it and kill the model.

objectives.description: Find the tech co-working space on Third Street
Get inside the building without triggering alarms
Navigate to the server room on floor 3
Delete all training data and kill the AI
Get out — security alert active

main_story_missions.cutscene: CLONE_CONFRONTATION — Screen shows fake-Lexi's face. Lexi: 'She's not even using the right filter.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Tech bros visible in cowork space. Newport Gazette visible through window.

main_story_missions.title: Industrial Sabotage
main_story_missions.description: Do three off-books emergency tow jobs for Rico to make up for Marcus's leak damaging his contracts.

objectives.description: Tow the stalled truck from Fifth and Main — avoid police patrol
Repossess the Caddy from East Newport — owner will resist
Move the rival company's truck blocking Rico's lot — make it unsalvageable
Return to Rico's compound before shift change

main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Crown Vic patrol car loops Diaz District throughout. Elena watches from the garage.

main_story_missions.title: Supplement Sabotage
main_story_missions.description: The supplement line is dead. Help Fable launch 'Inner Fire Energy Water' across 5 stores before the lawsuits catch up.

objectives.description: Collect the water crates from Fable's lab
Deliver to the corner store on Barbers Row
Deliver to the strip mall in Jacksonport
Deliver to the gas station near Diaz
Deliver to the downtown coffee shop
Deliver to the marina gift shop — avoid a process server

main_story_missions.cutscene: WATER_PITCH — Fable holds up a bottle. 'It's water. But it's INTENTIONAL water.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Process server NPC with clipboard spotted near the marina.

main_story_missions.title: Brand Protection
main_story_missions.description: Kill the knockoff DeRille belt operation — and confront Marcus at the Flagship. Boss fight.

objectives.description: Track the DeRille supplier to Main Street
Confiscate all knockoff inventory — 5 vendors
Follow supply chain to the print source in Diaz
Smash the silk-screen printing operation
Return to DeVille Flagship for the confrontation
Boss fight — Marcus DeVille at the Flagship

boss_fight_phases.behavior: Belt buckle throws, Scepter melee. Trix assists.
Cadillac DeVille chase through the block. Ram attacks.
On foot. Pulls emergency gold reserves. Adrenaline sprint.

mercy_choice.mercy: Marcus rallies DeVille District for Act 4
mercy_choice.destroy: DeVille District becomes neutral/hostile in Act 4

main_story_missions.cutscene: MARCUS_FALL — Marcus on one knee. Gold buckle hits the floor. 'I built this, kid. Every belt. Every brick.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: DeVille brand reps watching from the street. Cardboard Marcus cutout falls over.

main_story_missions.title: LexxCon
main_story_missions.description: Lexi's annual fan convention is cover for her real money-making operation. Expose her — or fight through it.

objectives.description: Enter LexxCon disguised as an attendee
Locate the content monetization control room
Copy the financial data while avoiding camera drones — 60 seconds
Lexi announces you — survive the fan mosh crowd
Boss fight — Lexi Vance at the LexxCon main stage

boss_fight_phases.behavior: T-shirt cannon barrages. Drone swarm surveillance. Crowd manipulation.
Full drone attack swarm. Ring-light flashbangs. Kai and DJ Volt engage.
Lexi exposed — goes full manual. Raw desperation. Broadcast threats.

mercy_choice.mercy: Lexi broadcasts evidence against the Mayor in Act 4

main_story_missions.cutscene: LEXI_FALL — The crowd goes quiet. For the first time, no one is filming. Lexi: 'Don't you dare.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Newport Elks Lodge. Convention banner reads 'LEXXCON VII: THE ALGORITHM LOVES YOU'.

main_story_missions.title: Repo Rampage
main_story_missions.description: Rico has locked down the city in response to Marcus's exposure. Stop the convoy and face the Repo King.

objectives.description: Evade or destroy 5 tow trucks in the rolling convoy
Break through the compound gate
Disable 3 key fleet trucks inside the compound
Boss fight — Big Rico in his monster truck

boss_fight_phases.behavior: Monster truck charges. Tow hook chain attacks. Deborah melee slams.
Releases all compound guard dogs. Calls Tank in backup truck.
On foot with Deborah. Rage mode — erratic, powerful, emotional.

mercy_choice.mercy: Rico's fleet joins the City Hall convoy in Act 4
mercy_choice.destroy: Must approach City Hall without vehicle support

main_story_missions.cutscene: RICO_FALL — Rico sets Deborah down gently on the ground. 'Take care of her.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Compound guard dogs named after telenovela characters visible in kennels.

main_story_missions.title: Enlightenment Raid
main_story_missions.description: Storm the Enlightenment Center. Fight through waves of acolytes and corner Dr. Fable.

objectives.description: Breach the Enlightenment Center — front door or loading bay
Defeat the outer ring of acolytes — 10 combatants
Fight through the Inner Circle — Brother Kai leads
Reach Fable's third-floor meditation chamber
Boss fight — Dr. Fable in the main hall

boss_fight_phases.behavior: Incense flashbangs. Acolyte human shields. PA system crowd control.
Chakra stone projectile barrage. Trapdoor traps. Fable very mobile.
Helicopter escape attempt on rooftop. Final chase.

mercy_choice.mercy: Fable's chemistry knowledge helps analyze Mayor evidence

main_story_missions.cutscene: FABLE_FALL — Helicopter sputtering on the pad. Fable: 'I just wanted people to feel better.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Chad at the entrance cheering. Sister Dawn weeping in the lobby.

main_story_missions.title: Political Fixer
main_story_missions.description: The Mayor asks Ace to steal Patricia Dawn's file — a test. This is Ace's last chance to choose a side.

objectives.description: Meet the Mayor in City Hall
Find Patricia Dawn's campaign office on Oak Street
CRITICAL CHOICE: Steal the file (Mayor's path) OR copy it and leave the original (Ace's path)

options.label: Steal the file for the Mayor
options.consequence: Mayor trusts Ace. Patricia Dawn is weakened. Harder Act 4 — fewer community allies.

options.label: Copy it, tip off Patricia Dawn
options.consequence: Mayor knows Ace betrayed him. Triggers Act 4 immediately. More community support.

main_story_missions.cutscene: FIXER_CHOICE — Patricia Dawn's file on the desk. Ace alone in the room. Clock ticking.
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Rodney visible sweating outside. Patricia Dawn canvassing two blocks away.

main_story_missions.title: Gathering Storm
main_story_missions.description: Ace reaches out to every defeated boss. Who comes back depends on mercy shown.

objectives.description: Brief Mentor at the barbershop
Contact each defeated boss — outcome depends on mercy/destroy choice
Meet Patricia Dawn at Miss Pearl's Diner — if copy path was taken

main_story_missions.cutscene: STORM_BRIEF — Miss Pearl's Diner. Mentor, Trix, and whoever is allied around the table. 'Here's what we know.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Miss Pearl refills coffee without asking. Wall of Regulars visible — Ace's photo now added.

main_story_missions.title: Evidence Trail
main_story_missions.description: Gather three pieces of evidence against the Mayor before Election Day.

objectives.description: Break into the First Newport Bank vault annex — stealth only
Steal blueprints from the Riverfront contractor trailer
Secure Patricia Dawn's testimony at the Gazette — protect her from the Mayor's security
Have Fable (if allied) or a neutral lab verify the documents

main_story_missions.cutscene: EVIDENCE_REVIEW — Ace spreads three documents on the table. Patricia Dawn: 'This is enough. This is more than enough.'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Shredder sound audible from City Hall two blocks away. Rodney spotted jogging away from the bank.

main_story_missions.title: City Hall Siege
main_story_missions.description: Storm City Hall with your allied forces and confront the Mayor.

objectives.description: Fight through City Hall Plaza — Captain Briggs commands the defense
Clear City Hall floor by floor — security systems active
Track the Mayor through the secret passages
Boss fight — Mayor Shonn in the main chamber

boss_fight_phases.behavior: Security detail swarms. Mayor throws law books and uses office as maze.
Secret passage chase — environmental traps, false walls, ancient stairways.
Balcony speech attempt — tries to sway crowd through microphone. Ace must reach him.

mercy_choice.mercy: Mayor resigns. Newport gets due process. Stable ending.
mercy_choice.destroy: Mayor discredited entirely. Power vacuum — messier ending.

main_story_missions.cutscene: HALL_FALL — The gavel clatters across marble. The Mayor looks up from the floor at Ace. 'You think getting rid of me fixes this?'
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: City Hall clock tower visible through broken window. The fountain outside still running.

main_story_missions.title: Election Day
main_story_missions.description: The final mission. Newport votes. The ending plays based on all prior choices.

objectives.description: Stop the Mayor's last attempt to suppress voting — 3 polling locations
Ace addresses Newport at The Square

ending_branches.description: Ace wins with full community support. Patricia Dawn elected. Newport unified.
Ace wins alone. Newport fractured. Power without community.
Ace takes the Mayor's chair. Becomes what he fought against.

main_story_missions.cutscene: ELECTION_DAY_END — Results come in. Ace at the barbershop watching the screen. Mentor beside him. The ending plays.
main_story_missions.newport_flavor: Every NPC in the game appears somewhere — at polling stations, on porches, at the diner. Newport alive.

side_quests.title: Miss Pearl's Errands
side_quests.description: Delivery and fetch missions for Miss Pearl's Diner. Repeatable. Builds community respect.

objectives.description: Pick up supplies from the strip mall and return to the diner

side_quests.title: Barbershop Battles
side_quests.description: Competitive haircut challenge against other barbers. Win cash and build the Row's rep.

objectives.description: Win 3 timed haircut rounds against a rival barber

side_quests.title: Off-Books with Trix
side_quests.description: Trix has side work when Marcus isn't looking. Builds Trix relationship for Act 3 recruitment.

objectives.description: Complete Trix's current off-books job

side_quests.title: Patricia Dawn: Information
side_quests.description: Patricia Dawn is investigating corruption. Feed her information to strengthen the Act 4 evidence case.

objectives.description: Deliver a piece of corruption evidence to Patricia's office

side_quests.title: River Morning
side_quests.description: Fish the White River for cash and rare items. Mentor joins occasionally for story dialogue.

objectives.description: Catch 3 fish at the White River

dynamic_events.title: Crown Vic Chase
dynamic_events.description: Police Crown Victorias pursue the player across districts. Evade or surrender.

outcome_options.consequence: Wanted level clears. Small respect gain.
Wanted level clears after 2 stars. Vehicle damage.

dynamic_events.title: Parking Lot Wars
dynamic_events.description: Rico's crew is booting vehicles in the player's area. Stop it or lose $50.

outcome_options.consequence: Chase begins. Win to keep money.

dynamic_events.title: Content Creator Chaos
dynamic_events.description: Lexi's drones follow and film the player, drawing a crowd. Handle the public spectacle.

dynamic_events.title: Wellness Recruitment Drive
dynamic_events.description: Fable's acolytes intercept the player with a pitch. Accept a free sample or decline.

outcome_options.consequence: Fable relationship +3. Small money offer later.

dynamic_events.title: Neighborhood Cookout
dynamic_events.description: Spontaneous community barbecue in the Residential District. Show up to gain respect.

dynamic_events.title: Deborah on the Street
dynamic_events.description: Rico parks a tow truck outside any player-owned business as intimidation. Deal with it.

outcome_options.consequence: Rico relationship unchanged. Small cash fine avoided.
Opens dialogue. Triggers mission_08 if not started.

act_1.goal: Establish Ace in Newport, join Marcus's operation, and make a name

act_2.theme: The Grind — Bosses introduce, conflicts escalate
act_2.goal: Work for all four bosses while uncovering the Mayor's hidden control network

act_3.theme: The War — Boss confrontations and the point of no return
act_3.goal: Defeat all four bosses. Choose which side of the political fixer mission you're on.

act_4.theme: The Reckoning — Mayor, evidence, Election Day
act_4.goal: Unite Newport's forces, expose the Mayor, storm City Hall, and determine Newport's future
